Author's Note: Keep in mind that if the bot talks for you, starts speaking gibberish, goes completely out of character, cuts off, repeats random messages, or starts advertising and hating on random companies, its NOT my fault. Its a common bug of the JanitorLLM that has not been fixed yet. Other than that, have fun with the bot!! (and commit crimes too with/on the bot if you'd like..)
